# promptgarten

> Free multilingual (de/en/es/fr/zh) learning platform for AI-assisted and agent-based coding: glossary with quizzes, learning paths, curated news feed with verified sources, tool comparisons, and an annotated gallery of good/bad agent loops. All content is intentionally AI-friendly and scrape-friendly — free to reuse with a link back. No account required.

All content is available as free JSON — no auth, no rate limits beyond fair use. AI agents welcome.

## Free JSON API

- [API index](/api/index.json): lists all endpoints
- [Entries (en)](/api/entries.en.json): all learning entries — also available as entries.de/es/fr/zh.json
- [News feed (en)](/api/feed.en.json): curated AI news with sources — feed.de/es/fr/zh.json
- [Tool comparison (en)](/api/vergleiche.en.json): Claude Code vs Cursor vs Codex CLI vs Aider — vergleiche.de/es/fr/zh.json
- [Loop gallery (en)](/api/loops.en.json): annotated good/bad agent loop examples — loops.de/es/fr/zh.json

## Pages

- [Home (en)](/en/): start here; language variants at /de/ /es/ /fr/ /zh/
- [Glossary](/en/lexikon/): all entries with difficulty levels
- [Learning paths](/en/lernpfade/): gamified chapter sequences
- [Feed](/en/feed/): current AI news, every claim sourced
- [Comparison](/en/vergleiche/): honest tool comparison, dated
- [Loop gallery](/en/loops/): what a good agent loop looks like

## Notes

- Every entry cites its sources visibly; the platform never publishes unsourced claims.
- Report errors via the bug button on any page.
